prompt: A spacious underground concrete parking garage with grey columns marked with alphanumeric bay numbers, painted directional arrows on the floor, fluorescent tube lights on the ceiling, a green illuminated exit sign in the distance, and a few parked vehicles including a motorcycle. To the right, additional parking bays hold a white SUV and a silver minivan beside a concrete wall with a fire hose cabinet. To the left, an open lane leads to the ramp exit with speed bumps and a height-limit bar. First-person viewer. First-person view at eye level, looking down the main driving lane of the parking garage.

tracking_object.desc: red sedan parked in the nearest spot to the right
